title: Alzheimer’s experts call for a dementia strategy matching Europe’s cancer plan [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Dementia experts from 12 countries have signed a policy paper urging Brussels to give dementia its own framework, modelled on the €4 billion Beating Cancer Plan
summary_public: Dementia experts from 12 countries have signed a policy paper urging Brussels to give dementia its own framework, modelled on the €4 billion Beating Cancer Plan

BE.label: positive
BE.evidence: Brussels to give dementia its own framework, modelled on the Cancer Plan
